tasks.title: Create bottom lines and Obsidian scope lock
tasks.acceptance: docs/BOTTOM_LINES.md exists and states Codex cannot modify other Obsidian content.

tasks.title: Complete v2 project scaffold
tasks.acceptance: Required folders, root marker, docs, data, overlay, dashboard, tools, tests, and obsidian_project pages exist.

tasks.title: Write project documentation system
tasks.acceptance: Core docs describe project, safety rules, setup, acceptance criteria, and handoff.

tasks.title: Document software setup
tasks.acceptance: docs/SOFTWARE_SETUP.md covers engineering, art, and Live2D tools.

tasks.title: Define character bible
tasks.acceptance: docs/CHARACTER_BIBLE.md defines persona, voice, visuals, and boundaries.

tasks.title: Define asset specifications
tasks.acceptance: docs/ASSET_SPEC.md covers PNGTuber and Live2D assets.

tasks.title: Write image prompts
tasks.acceptance: docs/IMAGE_PROMPTS.md includes base, expression, negative, character sheet, and three-view prompts.

tasks.title: Build PNGTuber overlay
tasks.acceptance: Overlay supports placeholder, mic volume, hotkeys, query params, blink, breathing, and debug panel.

tasks.title: Build static dashboard
tasks.acceptance: Dashboard reads JSON and JS fallback data.

tasks.title: Build logging system
tasks.acceptance: tools/log_event.py appends JSON logs and writes Markdown records.

tasks.title: Build asset validator
tasks.acceptance: tools/validate_assets.py reports missing PNGTuber and Live2D assets without crashing.

tasks.title: Build placeholder generator
tasks.acceptance: tools/generate_placeholder_assets.py creates engineering-only SVG placeholders.

tasks.title: Create Obsidian project pages
tasks.acceptance: obsidian_project pages summarize home, bottom lines, task board, asset status, and next actions.

tasks.title: Write Live2D layer spec
tasks.acceptance: docs/LIVE2D_LAYER_SPEC.md defines PSD layer groups and names.

tasks.title: Write rigger checklist
tasks.acceptance: docs/LIVE2D_RIGGER_CHECKLIST.md defines handoff and delivery checks.

tasks.title: Write OBS setup doc
tasks.acceptance: docs/OBS_SETUP.md explains local, GitHub Pages, microphone, and hotkey setup.

tasks.title: Write GitHub Pages setup doc
tasks.acceptance: docs/GITHUB_PAGES_SETUP.md explains dashboard and overlay publication.

tasks.title: Create project tests
tasks.acceptance: tests/test_project_files.py checks required files and JSON.

tasks.title: Create final handoff
tasks.acceptance: docs/FINAL_HANDOFF.md explains completed work, missing art, and next steps.

tasks.title: Final PNGTuber MVP art imported
tasks.acceptance: Final PNGTuber expression PNG files are added to assets/avatar/pngtuber/.

tasks.title: Waiting for final Live2D artwork and PSD
tasks.acceptance: Final front master and layered PSD exist under assets/avatar/live2d/final/.

tasks.title: Waiting for Live2D rigging
tasks.acceptance: Live2D Cubism model and VTube Studio test are complete.
